prompt_used: Story: The Fourth Tenant (the-fourth-tenant) | Hook: Rent is collected from an apartment that appears on no official map. | Subgenre: supernatural mystery | Tone: EERIE | Location: Flood-district prewar apartment block | Villain: The Landlord of Rooms That Move | Villain worldview: People accept impossible rooms when paperwork feels safe. | Motifs: door chains, wet plaster, rent slips. Compose ending score cue for "Compromised Truth" that supports summary "You expose fraud, but a key tenant disappears from all records." and epilogue "The culprit is exposed, but allies and witnesses are fractured.".
